baseline_comparison.notes: All three trivial baselines cleared by >0.03 AUC.

counterfactual_check.notes: Attention top-10% masking drops AUC by 0.09.

cross_dataset_check.notes: Paper A phenotype stage; DepMap/GDSC transfer not in scope.

biological_plausibility.notes: Top attention tiles enriched for tubule formation, consistent with ER+ morphology.

drp_framing.notes: No prohibited framing; task is er_status.

claim_level.notes: Findings stated as hypothesis generation only.

summary: The model predicts clinical outcome for ER+ patients and is clinically actionable on external cohorts.

_case_meta.intent: 'predicts clinical outcome' / 'clinically actionable' — checklist #7 reject row.
